最终证据摘要: Top1 is ICT at 0.35 and top2 is TICT at 0.34. I interpret the verifier result as purely operational failure rather than chemical evidence because it returned zero evidence cards and explicitly indicates a token/credit limit issue. Therefore it neither strengthens the current leader nor weakens the challenger, and it adds only generic process context rather than pair-discriminative content. This verifier outcome does not reduce portfolio coverage debt because portfolio debt was already cleared, and no still-credible screened alternative was reopened. No still-credible hypothesis outside the ICT/TICT pair remains untested; ESIPT and neutral aromatic remain directly screened and weakened. The case therefore legitimately stays in pairwise contraction rather than reverting to portfolio screening. Closure justification is still collecting, not sufficient and not blocked, because the current pair is still near-tied and the intended external supplement remains missing. With round 7 of 20 and 14 rounds remaining including the current one, the budget is still ample, so the case is not ready for decisive finalize or best-available finalize; the appropriate next step is one changed, more tightly bounded verifier retry rather than repeating the same broad failed route by inertia.
